evidence: packages/btd/src/allocation.ts implements weighted Hare-Niemeyer allocation over whole BTD cells
packages/btd/__tests__/v27-crypto-primitives.test.ts proves deterministic contributor ordering, range boundaries, and total token conservation
protocol-demonstration/src/v27-crypto-primitives.js and protocol-demonstration/test/v27-crypto-primitives.test.js witness the same conservation in the standalone demonstration

closureCriteria.criterion: settlement rows record direct holder, ancestor pool, treasury, holdback, and failed/pending routes
evidence: supabase/migrations/002_v27_btd_crypto_registry.sql now records direct_sats, ancestor_sats, treasury_sats, dispute_holdback_sats, direct_routes, ancestor_routes, treasury_routes, pending_routes, failed_routes, and route_state
the migration constraint btd_revenue_route_conserved requires gross_sats = direct_sats + ancestor_sats + treasury_sats + dispute_holdback_sats
internal-docs/BITCODE_EXCHANGE_DATABASE.md documents the expanded licensed-read revenue-route settlement row
packages/btd/src/revenue.ts emits btd.licensed_read_revenue_route receipts with direct, ancestor, treasury, dispute holdback, pending, failed, and routeState fields
protocol-demonstration/src/receipt-schemas.js requires disputeHoldbackSats, treasuryRoutes, pendingRoutes, failedRoutes, and routeState for btd_licensed_read_revenue_route
protocol-demonstration/src/v27-crypto-primitives.js emits the demonstration revenue-route receipt with holdback-aware conservation

closureCriteria.criterion: tests prove deterministic largest-remainder or accepted equivalent allocation
evidence: packages/btd/__tests__/v27-crypto-primitives.test.ts proves deterministic weighted fit allocation and conservation
packages/api/src/routes/__tests__/btd-crypto.test.ts proves licensed-read revenue settlement and explicit registry commit row shape
protocol-demonstration/test/v27-crypto-primitives.test.js proves allocation and revenue conservation in the demonstration

closureCriteria.criterion: API exposes an unversioned settlement boundary without relying on third-party royalty behavior
evidence: uapi/app/api/btd/licensed-read-revenue/route.ts binds the Next.js App Router endpoint without introducing a versioned route
the settlement route writes btd_licensed_read_revenue_routes only when commitToRegistry is explicitly true

validatedCommands.notes: Jest reports pre-existing duplicate manual mock warnings outside the V27 package/API slice.
Jest reports an existing ts-jest globals deprecation warning.
No versioned BTD route identifiers found.
Only the existing message-attachments implicit-any and streaming fileChanges blockers remain.

nonPromotionAssertions: Gate 8 closure does not claim live BTC wallet settlement, broadcaster finality, full source-to-shares write integration, generated proof-family promotion, or value-bearing mainnet readiness
All BTD API route paths remain unversioned
remainingGateFamilies: Gate 16: Product Surfaces, Research Rebinding, And Promotion Proof
